entities.name: CAUVERY BASIN
entities.description: A river basin in southern India experiencing transboundary water issues due to increasing water demand

entities.name: SOUTHERN INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the study is conducted

entities.name: WATER DEMAND
entities.description: The increasing requirement for water in the Cauvery basin

entities.name: WATER BALANCE COMPONENTS
entities.description: The various elements contributing to the water budget of a catchment

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL WATER MANAGEMENT INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Strategies implemented to manage water use in agriculture to optimize upstream-downstream trade-offs

entities.name: UPPER CAUVERY CATCHMENT
entities.description: The specific area within the Cauvery basin where the study was focused

entities.name: ANNUAL RAINFALL
entities.description: The amount of precipitation received annually, averaging 1280 mm in the study catchment

entities.name: EVAPOTRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The process by which water is transferred from the land to the atmosphere

entities.name: GROUNDWATER RECHARGE
entities.description: The process where water moves downward from surface water to groundwater

entities.name: SURFACE STORAGE
entities.description: Water stored on the surface of the land

entities.name: WESTERN GHATS
entities.description: A mountain pass and the main source of freshwater generation for the region

entities.name: FRESHWATER GENERATION
entities.description: The production of fresh water, primarily sourced from the Western Ghats

entities.name: HEMAVATHI RESERVOIR
entities.description: One of the three reservoirs supplying fresh water to canal command areas

entities.name: HARANGI RESERVOIR
entities.description: One of the three reservoirs supplying fresh water to canal command areas

entities.name: KRS RESERVOIR
entities.description: Also known as Krishnaraja Sagar reservoir, one of the three reservoirs supplying fresh water to canal command areas

entities.name: CANAL COMMAND AREAS
entities.description: Areas irrigated by canals supplied by reservoirs

entities.name: SURFACE RUNOFF
entities.description: Water from rain, snowmelt, or other sources that flows over the land surface

entities.name: MODELLING STUDY
entities.description: The research approach used to analyze water balance and AWM interventions
